message:
chore(deps): replace git-sourced asupersync with crates.io v0.3.0 (no-rev, tracked git HEAD)

xf previously pulled asupersync from the git repo with no rev pin
(effectively tracking origin/main) and also carried a
`[patch."https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git"]`
block redirecting frankensearch-core's transitive asupersync to the
same git URL. Both were there because no suitable crates.io release
existed at the time — now that v0.3.0 is published, both can collapse
to a standard version spec.

- Cargo.toml line 68: `asupersync = { git =
  "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync" }` → `asupersync
  = "0.3.0"`.
- Cargo.toml (old lines 141-143): remove the
  `[patch."https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git"]`
  block and its inline comment entirely. The frankensearch-* git deps
  still track their own git HEAD; their transitive asupersync now
  resolves from crates.io through normal cargo resolution.

Cargo.lock is NOT updated in this commit: `cargo update` currently
fails on a pre-existing xf issue (the `toon_rust = { git = "..." }`
entry in Cargo.toml line 55 references a package name that does not
exist at that repo — the toon_rust crate there is published as `tru`).
That toon_rust issue is a separate bug that should be fixed in its
own commit; once resolved, `cargo update` will regenerate the lockfile
against crates.io asupersync 0.3.0 cleanly.

files.patch:
@@ -65,7 +65,7 @@ frankensearch-core = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch
 frankensearch-fusion = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git", package = "frankensearch-fusion" }
 frankensearch-index = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git", package = "frankensearch-index" }
 frankensearch-embed = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git", package = "frankensearch-embed", features = ["hash", "model2vec", "fastembed"] }
-asupersync = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync" }
+asupersync = "0.3.0"
 
 # High-performance text processing
 regex = "1.10"
@@ -138,10 +138,6 @@ legacy-colors = []
 parallel-search = []
 alloc-count = []
 
-# Pin asupersync for frankensearch sub-crates to the canonical git repo.
-[patch."https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git"]
-asupersync = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync" }
-
 [[bench]]
 name = "search_perf"
 harness = false
